name: Santa Fe Chicken Tortellini Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Cook and drain tortellini according to package directions.
3. Grease a 3-quart casserole dish.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook broccoli, onion, and bell pepper in the oil for about 3 minutes, stirring frequently until crisp-tender. Remove the broccoli mixture from the skillet.
5. In the same skillet, cook flour with 2 tablespoons oil over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth. Stir in milk, broth, and cumin. Heat to boiling over medium heat; remove from heat.
6. Stir in chicken, Monterey Jack cheese, tortellini, and broccoli mixture. Spoon the casserole into the prepared dish.
7. Bake uncovered for 25-35 minutes or until bubbly.
8. During the last 5 minutes of baking, sprinkle with Colby cheese and tortilla chips; bake until cheese is melted.
